w:r.w:t: Food of the week is Lettuce
IL will make an exercise for students that they have to share their lunch and other things.
IL will call Pupils and ask them to share their examples of feeling good when they share their things with others.
Pupils will come pick the picture of animal and tell about it. (IL will place pictures of pet animals.
IL will show the pictures of different pet animals and pupils will tell their names.
IL will explain the activities, and after that they will do their work independently on booklet.
page #42. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end
Food of the week is Lettuce
Send notice in diaries “Bring lettuce (or anything in which lettuce is used) in lunch.”
IL to do a 5 min warm up with the pupils.
What is the national fruit of Pakistan? Ans:
How many Eids do Muslims celebrate? Name them.
Ans: Muslims celebrate two Eids. (Eid-ul-Fitr and Eid-ul-Adha).
Tell the names of 5 pet animals.
Dog, Cat, Parrot, Fish and Rabbit.
